response: Yes, Steve Perry and Dennis Lyxzén are both members of the same band, **Journey**. Steve Perry was the lead singer of Journey during their most commercially successful periods from 1977 to 1987 and again from 1995 to 1998. Dennis Lyxzén was the lead vocalist of the Swedish punk rock band **Refused** and later became the lead vocalist of **INVSN**. They are both known for their work in the rock music industry.
